TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == :Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios,1783Âπ¥7Êúà24Êó•‚Äî1830Âπ¥12Êúà17Êó•), . Si-mung.hu.An-tung-ni-aw.Te-la-san-ti-ai-ma.Ta-li-ni-ta.pow-li-wa-Pa-la-si-aw-s (Si-panng-ya a kamu:Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios, 1783 a mihca 7 a bulad 24 a demiad - 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad) u ngangan Si-mung.Pow-li-wa, La-tin-mey-cow tesek milaangay, tesekay mikawaway nu hitay, tesekay nu cen-ce, tesekay nu mizatengay, ciziza aci Sen-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u Nan-mey-cow amiliyas tu pikuwan nu Si-pang-ya, angangan milunguc amisateked palekal. nilaculan i makay atu Si-pang-ya sakakaay mikeliday nu kanatal pilalebuay makademec hawsa, Pow-li-wa aci Sen-ma-tin mapulung miedap tu Nan-mey-cow a kasateked nu kanatal, patizeng tu La-tin-mey-cow u saayaway nu mitekeday a kakadum nu kanatal, u Taa-ke-lon-pi-ya, 1819 a mihcaan katukuh 1830 a muhcaan mala Cung-tung nuyniay a kanatal. nikauzipanÁîüÂπ≥ Si-mung.pow-li-wa lecuhiI Wi-ney-luy-la-cya-la-cya-s cacay u kakitaan a luma'. lecuh i ayzaay a Wi-ney-luy-la angangan nu cya-la-cya-s, ngasaw a ngangnan Pow-li-wa u makayzaay I Si-pang-ya Pa-s-ke a kakitizaan tu Si-aw-al-te-sa-OW-li-wa-al. I lima' niza, caay ku ahebal ku pipalumaan atu 1000 a katuud ku kuli dada', izaw hena ku kim a aalaan, waneng kusi, luma' zaysang atu pacakayan tu zyunga. zuma midebungay mahiza u sikulisiway, u labu nu luma' niza u mipenecay, u mamipenecay aca. u sasikezay nuheni a mialaw tu mikuliay a sakauzip. zumaay tu, u heni i cen-cean, kizayanan masakinih nu midebungay a Si-pang-ya, mipenec, siza, uyni sikalisiway sakalah amaydih pabelin tu mikuwanay nu midemungay, mihulak tu sacukcuk nu midebungay. ci Pow-li-wa cay katenes a lecuhan, caay kakapah ku uzip niza a wama ina ahicanaca papidiput han niza ku nu luma'ay akuli, tusa a mihcaan hawsa ci Pow-li-wa tayza tu i luma'a ni wama ina niza, uyzasa zikuz u ngelu' niza malalid malalid ku pihaceng. 1786 a mihca 1 a bulad, ci Pow-li-wa tusa izaw ku pangkiw a mihcaan hawsa, u wama ci Bo-an.Wi-sen-te.Pow-li-wa zayhan mahaykaku mapatay, 8 a mihcaan ku nikauzip hawsa "1792 a mihcaan" wina ci Tang-na.Ma-li-ya.Te-la-kungsay-pow-si-ong.Pa-la-si-aw-s.i .Pu-lan-ke mapatay, mapatay tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ci Ka-low-s amasingan a luma' mueneng ciniza, nama hiza i 1799 a mihcaan tayza i Si-pang-ya minanam tu Ba a cudad, 1802 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad maladay ci Ma-li-ya.Ta-lye-ya.Low-te-li-kuy-ce.Te-al-tu-low.A-lay-sa i Si-pang-ya-Ma-te-li malaacawa, 7 a bulad 12 a demiad maladay tu acawa taluma' i niyazu' Wi-ney-luy-la, nika acawa ci Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa i 1803 a mihca 1 a bulad 22 a demiad malalid nu imelang mapatay.1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow ciniza, 12 a bulad 2 a demiad tayza i Pa-li milihiza tu pakawlah ni Na-pow-lun, mala mikiliday nu mikuwanay ni Na-pow-lun. mapatayÊ≠ª‰∫° , Si-mung.pow-li-wa i 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad zayhan mahaykaku mapatay i Ke-lun-piya "ayzaay a Ke-lun-piya" a Sen-ma-al-ta.1842 a mihca 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Pow-li-wa a ukak matadem i ngasawan a tadem. ci Pow-li-wa i ayaw a mapatay misalunguc ciniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanay ci Tan-ni-al.Bow-low-lun-s.Aw-li tuduhen ku zikuc niza, pasu nisulitan, tigami atu sapapelu a nisulitan. teked a nikaauzipÁßÅ‰∫∫ÁîüÊ¥ª 1799 a mihcaan 16 ku mihcaan cni Pow-li-wa miladay tu kapah hena mapatay tu a wama ci Hu-an.Wi-sen-te "1786 a mihcaan mapatay" atu wina ci Kang-say.pu-si-ong "1792 a mihcaan", miliwku miccudad I Mo-si-ke, Ba-kow atu Si-pang-ya. 1802 a mihcaan, i Ma-te-li- tu makayniay i Cya-la-cya-s-Ma-al-ke-s.te-al.to-low luma'ay a Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa.Li-te-li-ke-s.Te-al.to-low.A-lay-ca malaacawaw, 8 a bulad zikuz mikilid tu luma'ay taluma' i Wi-ney-loy-la, caay ka lemed malalid tu akuti'ay a imelang mapatay. Pow-li-ya i 1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow, i Na-pow-lun a hungtian a kanatal miliwku. i Ba-kow a demiadani Pa-li maazih niza ci Ya-li-san-ta. Bung.Hung-paw. Hung-paw na i1804 a mihcaan misulit tu, "na i Pali maazih ku cacay masakapahay a tatamia, masasukamu cinizaan hawsa mihaymaw sakay cinizaan tu paydang maydih manawang, nika nayinayi' ku kasibalucu'. laluma'an Ë¶™Â±¨ . ci Pow-li-wa nayi' ku wawa, u wawanay mabenit atu sibuluuk, u laluma'an niza uyza kakana sabama dada' izaw ku cacay a sabana mapatay. Kakana ci Hu-an-na.Pow-li-wa.Pow-la-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ci Ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-la-si-aw-s.Pu-lan-ke, asaca tatusa ku nipahabay tu wawaci Ci-li-al-mu atu ci Pan-ni-ci-na. Ci-li-al-mu i 1817 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 demiad mapulung tu sinaama milais mapatay, Pan-ni-ci-na natusaay tu siacawa, Pow-li-wa a sangaayay a laluma'an, tatusaay a baki nuheni ci Pey-te-low-atciAy-te-hwa-tu, zikuz katukuh 2009 a mihcaan mauzip i Cyw-la-Cya-s.
S.PHON: == kakir~…æiman == :sim*n *os* antonio d…ô r~…æa sant*sima trinidad bor~…æ**ar j par~…æa ¶ios,**********************), . si-mu≈ã.ƒßu.an-tu≈ã-ni-aw.t…ô-r~…æa-san-ti-ai-ma.ta-r~…æi-ni-ta.pow-r~…æi-wa-pa-r~…æa-si-aw-s (si-pan≈ã-ja a kamu:sim*n *os* antonio d…ô r~…æa sant*sima trinidad bor~…æ**ar j par~…æa ¶ios, **** a miƒß ¶a * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad - **** a miƒß ¶a ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad) u ≈ãa≈ãan si-mu≈ã.pow-r~…æi-wa, r~…æa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow t…ôs…ôk mir~…æaa≈ãaj, t…ôs…ôkaj mikawawaj nu ƒßitaj, t…ôs…ôkaj nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, t…ôs…ôkaj nu mizat…ô≈ãaj, ¶iziza a ¶i s…ôn-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u nan-m…ô- ¶ow amir~…æijas tu pikuwan nu si-pa≈ã-ja, a≈ãa≈ãan mir~…æu≈ãu ¶ amisat…ôk…ôd par~…æ…ôkar~…æ. nir~…æa ¶ur~…æan i makaj atu si-pa≈ã-ja sakakaaj mik…ôr~…æidaj nu kanatar~…æ pir~…æar~…æ…ôbuaj makad…ôm…ô ¶ ƒßawsa, pow-r~…æi-wa a ¶i s…ôn-ma-tin mapur~…æu≈ã mi…ôdap tu nan-m…ô- ¶ow a kasat…ôk…ôd nu kanatar~…æ, patiz…ô≈ã tu r~…æa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow u saajawaj nu mit…ôk…ôdaj a kakadum nu kanatar~…æ, u taa-k…ô-r~…æon-pi-ja, **** a miƒß ¶aan katukuƒß **** a muƒß ¶aan mar~…æa ¶u≈ã-tu≈ã nujniaj a kanatar~…æ. nikauzipan** si-mu≈ã.pow-r~…æi-wa r~…æ…ô ¶uƒßii wi-n…ô-r~…æuj-r~…æa- ¶ja-r~…æa- ¶ja-s ¶a ¶aj u kakitaan a r~…æuma î~ °. r~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i ajzaaj a wi-n…ô-r~…æuj-r~…æa a≈ãa≈ãan nu ¶ja-r~…æa- ¶ja-s, ≈ãasaw a ≈ãa≈ãnan pow-r~…æi-wa u makajzaaj i si-pa≈ã-ja pa-s-k…ô a kakitizaan tu si-aw-ar~…æ-t…ô-sa-ow-r~…æi-wa-ar~…æ. i r~…æima î~ ° niza, ¶aaj ku aƒß…ôbar~…æ ku pipar~…æumaan atu **** a katuud ku kur~…æi dada î~ °, izaw ƒß…ôna ku kim a aar~…æaan, wan…ô≈ã kusi, r~…æuma î~ ° zajsa≈ã atu pa ¶akajan tu zju≈ãa. zuma mid…ôbu≈ãaj maƒßiza u sikur~…æisiwaj, u r~…æabu nu r~…æuma î~ ° niza u mip…ôn…ô ¶aj, u mamip…ôn…ô ¶aj a ¶a. u sasik…ôzaj nuƒß…ôni a miar~…æaw tu mikur~…æiaj a sakauzip. zumaaj tu, u ƒß…ôni i ¶…ôn- ¶…ôan, kizajanan masakiniƒß nu mid…ôbu≈ãaj a si-pa≈ã-ja, mip…ôn…ô ¶, siza, ujni sikar~…æisiwaj sakar~…æaƒß amajdiƒß pab…ôr~…æin tu mikuwanaj nu mid…ômu≈ãaj, miƒßur~…æak tu sa ¶uk ¶uk nu mid…ôbu≈ãaj. ¶i pow-r~…æi-wa ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs a r~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan, ¶aaj kakapaƒß ku uzip niza a wama ina aƒßi ¶ana ¶a papidiput ƒßan niza ku nu r~…æuma î~ °aj akur~…æi, tusa a miƒß ¶aan ƒßawsa ¶i pow-r~…æi-wa tajza tu i r~…æuma î~ °a ni wama ina niza, ujzasa zikuz u ≈ã…ôr~…æu î~ ° niza mar~…æar~…æid mar~…æar~…æid ku piƒßa ¶…ô≈ã. **** a miƒß ¶a * a bur~…æad, ¶i pow-r~…æi-wa tusa izaw ku pa≈ãkiw a miƒß ¶aan ƒßawsa, u wama ¶i bo-an.wi-s…ôn-t…ô.pow-r~…æi-wa zajƒßan maƒßajkaku mapataj, * a miƒß ¶aan ku nikauzip ƒßawsa "**** a miƒß ¶aan" wina ¶i ta≈ã-na.ma-r~…æi-ja.t…ô-r~…æa-ku≈ãsaj-pow-si-o≈ã.pa-r~…æa-si-aw-s.i .pu-r~…æan-k…ô mapataj, mapataj tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ¶i ka-r~…æow-s amasi≈ãan a r~…æuma î~ ° mu…ôn…ô≈ã ¶iniza, nama ƒßiza i **** a miƒß ¶aan tajza i si-pa≈ã-ja minanam tu ba a ¶udad, **** a miƒß ¶a * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad mar~…æadaj ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja.ta-r~…æj…ô-ja.r~…æow-t…ô-r~…æi-kuj- ¶…ô.t…ô-ar~…æ-tu-r~…æow.a-r~…æaj-sa i si-pa≈ã-ja-ma-t…ô-r~…æi mar~…æaa ¶awa, * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad mar~…æadaj tu a ¶awa tar~…æuma î~ ° i nijazu î~ ° wi-n…ô-r~…æuj-r~…æa, nika a ¶awa ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja.t…ô-r~…æj…ô-sa i **** a miƒß ¶a * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad mar~…æar~…æid nu im…ôr~…æa≈ã mapataj.**** a miƒß ¶aan tar~…æuma î~ ° i aw- ¶ow ¶iniza, ** a bur~…æad * a d…ômiad tajza i pa-r~…æi mir~…æiƒßiza tu pakawr~…æaƒß ni na-pow-r~…æun, mar~…æa mikir~…æidaj nu mikuwanaj ni na-pow-r~…æun. mapataj** , si-mu≈ã.pow-r~…æi-wa i **** a miƒß ¶a ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad zajƒßan maƒßajkaku mapataj i k…ô-r~…æun-pija "ajzaaj a k…ô-r~…æun-pija" a s…ôn-ma-ar~…æ-ta.**** a miƒß ¶a ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, pow-r~…æi-wa a ukak matad…ôm i ≈ãasawan a tad…ôm. ¶i pow-r~…æi-wa i ajaw a mapataj misar~…æu≈ãu ¶ ¶iniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanaj ¶i tan-ni-ar~…æ.bow-r~…æow-r~…æun-s.aw-r~…æi tuduƒß…ôn ku ziku ¶ niza, pasu nisur~…æitan, tigami atu sapap…ôr~…æu a nisur~…æitan. t…ôk…ôd a nikaauzip**** **** a miƒß ¶aan ** ku miƒß ¶aan ¶ni pow-r~…æi-wa mir~…æadaj tu kapaƒß ƒß…ôna mapataj tu a wama ¶i ƒßu-an.wi-s…ôn-t…ô "**** a miƒß ¶aan mapataj" atu wina ¶i ka≈ã-saj.pu-si-o≈ã "**** a miƒß ¶aan", mir~…æiwku mi ¶ ¶udad i mo-si-k…ô, ba-kow atu si-pa≈ã-ja. **** a miƒß ¶aan, i ma-t…ô-r~…æi- tu makajniaj i ¶ja-r~…æa- ¶ja-s-ma-ar~…æ-k…ô-s.t…ô-ar~…æ.to-r~…æow r~…æuma î~ °aj a ma-r~…æi-ja.t…ô-r~…æj…ô-sa.r~…æi-t…ô-r~…æi-k…ô-s.t…ô-ar~…æ.to-r~…æow.a-r~…æaj- ¶a mar~…æaa ¶awaw, * a bur~…æad zikuz mikir~…æid tu r~…æuma î~ °aj tar~…æuma î~ ° i wi-n…ô-r~…æoj-r~…æa, ¶aaj ka r~…æ…ôm…ôd mar~…æar~…æid tu akuti î~ °aj a im…ôr~…æa≈ã mapataj. pow-r~…æi-ja i **** a miƒß ¶aan tar~…æuma î~ ° i aw- ¶ow, i na-pow-r~…æun a ƒßu≈ãtian a kanatar~…æ mir~…æiwku. i ba-kow a d…ômiadani pa-r~…æi maaziƒß niza ¶i ja-r~…æi-san-ta. bu≈ã.ƒßu≈ã-paw. ƒßu≈ã-paw na i**** a miƒß ¶aan misur~…æit tu, "na i par~…æi maaziƒß ku ¶a ¶aj masakapaƒßaj a tatamia, masasukamu ¶inizaan ƒßawsa miƒßajmaw sakaj ¶inizaan tu pajda≈ã majdiƒß manawa≈ã, nika najinaji î~ ° ku kasibar~…æu ¶u î~ °. r~…æar~…æuma î~ °an ** . ¶i pow-r~…æi-wa naji î~ ° ku wawa, u wawanaj mab…ônit atu sibur~…æuuk, u r~…æar~…æuma î~ °an niza ujza kakana sabama dada î~ ° izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a sabana mapataj. kakana ¶i ƒßu-an-na.pow-r~…æi-wa.pow-r~…æa-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ¶i ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-r~…æa-si-aw-s.pu-r~…æan-k…ô, asa ¶a tatusa ku nipaƒßabaj tu wawa ¶i ¶i-r~…æi-ar~…æ-mu atu ¶i pan-ni- ¶i-na. ¶i-r~…æi-ar~…æ-mu i **** a miƒß ¶a ** a bur~…æad * d…ômiad mapur~…æu≈ã tu sinaama mir~…æais mapataj, pan-ni- ¶i-na natusaaj tu sia ¶awa, pow-r~…æi-wa a sa≈ãaajaj a r~…æar~…æuma î~ °an, tatusaaj a baki nuƒß…ôni ¶i p…ô-t…ô-r~…æow-at ¶iaj-t…ô-ƒßwa-tu, zikuz katukuƒß **** a miƒß ¶aan mauzip i ¶jw-r~…æa- ¶ja-s.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == :Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios,1783Âπ¥7Êúà24Êó•‚Äî1830Âπ¥12Êúà17Êó•), . Si-mung.hu.An-tung-ni-aw.Te-la-san-ti-ai-ma.Ta-li-ni-ta.pow-li-wa-Pa-la-si-aw-s (Si-panng-ya a kamu:Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios, 1783 a mihca 7 a bulad 24 a demiad - 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad) u ngangan Si-mung.Pow-li-wa, La-tin-mey-cow tesek milaangay, tesekay mikawaway nu hitay, tesekay nu cen-ce, tesekay nu mizatengay, ciziza aci Sen-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u Nan-mey-cow amiliyas tu pikuwan nu Si-pang-ya, angangan milunguc amisateked palekal. nilaculan i makay atu Si-pang-ya sakakaay mikeliday nu kanatal pilalebuay makademec hawsa, Pow-li-wa aci Sen-ma-tin mapulung miedap tu Nan-mey-cow a kasateked nu kanatal, patizeng tu La-tin-mey-cow u saayaway nu mitekeday a kakadum nu kanatal, u Taa-ke-lon-pi-ya, 1819 a mihcaan katukuh 1830 a muhcaan mala Cung-tung nuyniay a kanatal. nikauzipanÁîüÂπ≥ Si-mung.pow-li-wa lecuhiI Wi-ney-luy-la-cya-la-cya-s cacay u kakitaan a luma'. lecuh i ayzaay a Wi-ney-luy-la angangan nu cya-la-cya-s, ngasaw a ngangnan Pow-li-wa u makayzaay I Si-pang-ya Pa-s-ke a kakitizaan tu Si-aw-al-te-sa-OW-li-wa-al. I lima' niza, caay ku ahebal ku pipalumaan atu 1000 a katuud ku kuli dada', izaw hena ku kim a aalaan, waneng kusi, luma' zaysang atu pacakayan tu zyunga. zuma midebungay mahiza u sikulisiway, u labu nu luma' niza u mipenecay, u mamipenecay aca. u sasikezay nuheni a mialaw tu mikuliay a sakauzip. zumaay tu, u heni i cen-cean, kizayanan masakinih nu midebungay a Si-pang-ya, mipenec, siza, uyni sikalisiway sakalah amaydih pabelin tu mikuwanay nu midemungay, mihulak tu sacukcuk nu midebungay. ci Pow-li-wa cay katenes a lecuhan, caay kakapah ku uzip niza a wama ina ahicanaca papidiput han niza ku nu luma'ay akuli, tusa a mihcaan hawsa ci Pow-li-wa tayza tu i luma'a ni wama ina niza, uyzasa zikuz u ngelu' niza malalid malalid ku pihaceng. 1786 a mihca 1 a bulad, ci Pow-li-wa tusa izaw ku pangkiw a mihcaan hawsa, u wama ci Bo-an.Wi-sen-te.Pow-li-wa zayhan mahaykaku mapatay, 8 a mihcaan ku nikauzip hawsa "1792 a mihcaan" wina ci Tang-na.Ma-li-ya.Te-la-kungsay-pow-si-ong.Pa-la-si-aw-s.i .Pu-lan-ke mapatay, mapatay tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ci Ka-low-s amasingan a luma' mueneng ciniza, nama hiza i 1799 a mihcaan tayza i Si-pang-ya minanam tu Ba a cudad, 1802 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad maladay ci Ma-li-ya.Ta-lye-ya.Low-te-li-kuy-ce.Te-al-tu-low.A-lay-sa i Si-pang-ya-Ma-te-li malaacawa, 7 a bulad 12 a demiad maladay tu acawa taluma' i niyazu' Wi-ney-luy-la, nika acawa ci Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa i 1803 a mihca 1 a bulad 22 a demiad malalid nu imelang mapatay.1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow ciniza, 12 a bulad 2 a demiad tayza i Pa-li milihiza tu pakawlah ni Na-pow-lun, mala mikiliday nu mikuwanay ni Na-pow-lun. mapatayÊ≠ª‰∫° , Si-mung.pow-li-wa i 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad zayhan mahaykaku mapatay i Ke-lun-piya "ayzaay a Ke-lun-piya" a Sen-ma-al-ta.1842 a mihca 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Pow-li-wa a ukak matadem i ngasawan a tadem. ci Pow-li-wa i ayaw a mapatay misalunguc ciniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanay ci Tan-ni-al.Bow-low-lun-s.Aw-li tuduhen ku zikuc niza, pasu nisulitan, tigami atu sapapelu a nisulitan. teked a nikaauzipÁßÅ‰∫∫ÁîüÊ¥ª 1799 a mihcaan 16 ku mihcaan cni Pow-li-wa miladay tu kapah hena mapatay tu a wama ci Hu-an.Wi-sen-te "1786 a mihcaan mapatay" atu wina ci Kang-say.pu-si-ong "1792 a mihcaan", miliwku miccudad I Mo-si-ke, Ba-kow atu Si-pang-ya. 1802 a mihcaan, i Ma-te-li- tu makayniay i Cya-la-cya-s-Ma-al-ke-s.te-al.to-low luma'ay a Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa.Li-te-li-ke-s.Te-al.to-low.A-lay-ca malaacawaw, 8 a bulad zikuz mikilid tu luma'ay taluma' i Wi-ney-loy-la, caay ka lemed malalid tu akuti'ay a imelang mapatay. Pow-li-ya i 1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow, i Na-pow-lun a hungtian a kanatal miliwku. i Ba-kow a demiadani Pa-li maazih niza ci Ya-li-san-ta. Bung.Hung-paw. Hung-paw na i1804 a mihcaan misulit tu, "na i Pali maazih ku cacay masakapahay a tatamia, masasukamu cinizaan hawsa mihaymaw sakay cinizaan tu paydang maydih manawang, nika nayinayi' ku kasibalucu'. laluma'an Ë¶™Â±¨ . ci Pow-li-wa nayi' ku wawa, u wawanay mabenit atu sibuluuk, u laluma'an niza uyza kakana sabama dada' izaw ku cacay a sabana mapatay. Kakana ci Hu-an-na.Pow-li-wa.Pow-la-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ci Ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-la-si-aw-s.Pu-lan-ke, asaca tatusa ku nipahabay tu wawaci Ci-li-al-mu atu ci Pan-ni-ci-na. Ci-li-al-mu i 1817 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 demiad mapulung tu sinaama milais mapatay, Pan-ni-ci-na natusaay tu siacawa, Pow-li-wa a sangaayay a laluma'an, tatusaay a baki nuheni ci Pey-te-low-atciAy-te-hwa-tu, zikuz katukuh 2009 a mihcaan mauzip i Cyw-la-Cya-s.
